channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Richard Garriott Aims to Reclaim Ultima from EA
item.description: Richard Garriott plans to regain control of the Ultima RPG series he sold to EA in the 90s using legal strategies. His approach is unconventional and intriguing.

item.title: NVIDIA DLSS Now Available in NVK Vulkan Driver
item.description: NVIDIA's DLSS support has been integrated into the open-source NVK Vulkan driver for Linux, enhancing gaming performance. This update is part of Mesa 26.2-devel.

item.title: Ubisoft Co-Founder Claude Guillemot Dies in Crash
item.description: Claude Guillemot, co-founder of Ubisoft, tragically died in a plane crash in France. An investigation is currently underway.

item.title: Microsoft to End Office 2021 Support This Year
item.description: Microsoft will cease support for Office 2021 later this year, prompting users to consider alternatives. Details on transition options are forthcoming.

item.title: Unfixable Security Flaw Found in Seven iPhone Models
item.description: A cybersecurity firm has identified an unfixable security flaw affecting seven iPhone models, posing risks to users. Hackers could exploit this vulnerability.

item.title: Details on WOTC's Cancelled Horror Game Revealed
item.description: Exclusive insights into Wizards of the Coast's cancelled horror game 'Project Sundown' and its implications for the studio's future have emerged.

item.title: Top 10 PS5 Games of 2026 So Far
item.description: Discover the best PS5 games of 2026 as voted by players. The list showcases the standout titles halfway through the year.

item.title: Prime Day Tech Deals: Up to 55% Off
item.description: Amazon's Prime Day offers significant discounts on tech products, including Apple and Samsung devices. Deals run from June 23 to June 26.

item.title: Xbox Founder Warns of Resurgent Industry Fears
item.description: Laura Fryer, an original Xbox founder, expresses concerns about rising hardware costs and AI's impact on the gaming industry. Old anxieties resurface.

item.title: Xbox Series S Aids Switch 2 Development
item.description: Digital Foundry suggests that the Xbox Series S has facilitated development for the upcoming Nintendo Switch 2, easing the process for developers.

item.title: Commodore's New Flip Phone Appeals to Gen Z
item.description: The Commodore Callback flip phone offers essential features without social media, targeting Gen Z's desire for distraction-free communication.

item.title: Siri AI Offers Enhanced San Francisco Tour
item.description: A hands-on experience with the new Siri AI reveals its conversational abilities and helpfulness in navigating San Francisco. Users find it more engaging.

item.title: Bentley Shocks Mat Armstrong with Service Verdict
item.description: YouTuber Mat Armstrong received a surprising verdict during a service appointment for his rebuilt Bentley Continental GT, leaving him stunned.

item.title: Five Affordable Alternatives to Google Pixel 10 Pro
item.description: Explore five budget-friendly Android phones that rival the Google Pixel 10 Pro in key features, offering solid competition without the high price.

item.title: Lifetime Access to AI Tools for Just $55
item.description: Get lifetime access to Claude, Gemini, and Gemini AI tools for an unprecedented low price of $55. This offer is a significant deal for users.
